name: vendor-risk-portal
description: AI-Assisted Vendor Risk Questionnaire Analysis Tool (SIG -> ISO 27001 / ISO 27002 / GDPR)

scripts.install-all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
